name: 45Drives Storage Wizard Phase 2.5
description: Update the 45Drives setup/storage wizard (Electron client on Win/Mac/Linux + cockpit modules on server) to fully support: offsite backup/recovery (cloud sync + replication via cockpit-scheduler), snapshot viewing/managing/rollback (including Active Backup pool replication with chain integrity checks), a 4-step custom setup wizard (Server Info → ZFS Setup → Samba Setup → Users & Groups), Electron auto-update, real-time transfer progress for rsync/ZFS/rclone with speed/ETA/persistence, structured logging with credential scrubbing and audit trails for destructive actions, multi-server/multi-user credential management with OS-native encryption (Electron safeStorage), NAT/firewall connectivity handling, encryption-at-rest surfacing (ZFS native + rclone crypt), and a UI/UX overhaul making all wizard flows visually distinct, intuitive, and engaging.
goal: Deliver a comprehensive, polished, and secure storage management experience: offsite backup/recovery with cloud & external server support (including NAT/connectivity handling), snapshot management & rollback with chain integrity, custom setup wizard with encryption options, auto-update, improved transfer UX with progress/speed/persistence across rsync/ZFS/rclone, structured logging with audit trails, multi-server credential management with OS-native encryption, and a visually compelling UI that users want to engage with.
hypothesis: By porting proven patterns from studio-share (auto-update, rsync progress, transfer persistence, winston logging, credential scrubbing), extending the cockpit-scheduler SimpleUI integration, leveraging Electron safeStorage for OS-native credential encryption, surfacing existing ZFS/rclone encryption capabilities, and investing in UI/UX polish across all wizard flows, we can deliver all features within a 2-3 week solo sprint.

threads.name: Planning & Architecture Review
threads.description: Map integration points, finalize architecture decisions, validate existing code state, assess security posture and network constraints, and unblock all execution threads.
threads.objective: Map integration points, finalize architecture decisions, validate existing code state, assess security posture and network constraints, and unblock all execution threads.

tasks.name: Audit credential storage & design multi-server schema
tasks.description: Review current single-file credential flow in houston-client-manager/src/main/. Map single-file limitation and design per-server/per-user keyed schema.

tasks.name: Map cockpit-scheduler SimpleUI integration points
tasks.description: Re-test webview embedding of cockpit-scheduler ?simple=1 mode. Verify cloud sync and replication task CRUD from client Dashboard.

tasks.name: Audit ZFS snapshot API in houston-common-lib
tasks.description: Review ZFS manager snapshot list/rollback/send-receive methods. Identify which IPC messages already exist vs. need to be created. Identify gaps for Active Backup replication path.

tasks.name: Design custom setup wizard 4-step flow
tasks.description: Finalize the 4-step custom setup flow: Server Info (name, admin user/pass, timezone, root SSH) → ZFS Setup (pool name, vdev types, disk config, dataset) → Samba Setup (shares, permissions, credentials) → Users & Groups (users, groups, SSH keys). Define config objects, validation rules, component tree.

tasks.name: Review studio-share code for portability
tasks.description: Catalog all files to port from studio-share: updates.ts, rsync-path.ts, rsync-runner.ts, transfer-store.ts, scrubSecrets.ts, logging init, log policy, preload appLog bridge. Note adaptation points for houston-client-manager.

tasks.name: Security & network architecture spike
tasks.description: Assess current security posture: credential storage (SSH keys in ~/.houston/.ssh/, cert TOFU in trusted-certs.json, rclone.conf plaintext, localStorage unencrypted). Map Electron safeStorage API availability per platform (DPAPI on Windows, Keychain on macOS, libsecret on Linux). Document NAT/firewall constraints for offsite backup — current state requires direct SSH reachability. Define Phase 2.5 approach: manual port forwarding + custom SSH port + connectivity pre-check. Document Phase 3 deferral for full NAT traversal (Tailscale/WireGuard).

threads.name: Multi-Server Credential Management
threads.description: Refactor credential storage from single-server/single-user to support multiple servers and multiple client users with unattended backup capability. Encrypt sensitive credentials at rest using Electron safeStorage API (OS-native keychains).
threads.objective: Refactor credential storage from single-server/single-user to support multiple servers and multiple client users with unattended backup capability, encrypted at rest via OS-native keychains.

tasks.name: Design per-server credential schema
tasks.description: Define JSON schema keyed by host:port:username. Include SSH key path, SMB credentials, certificate fingerprint, and last-used timestamp.

tasks.name: Implement CredentialStore module
tasks.description: Create CredentialStore class that manages credentials/{host}_{user}.json files. Port cert-pins TOFU pattern from studio-share. CRUD operations plus migration from old single-file format.

tasks.name: Refactor SSH setup to use CredentialStore
tasks.description: Update setupSsh.ts and connection flows to read/write from new credential store instead of single file.

tasks.name: Refactor backup managers to use CredentialStore
tasks.description: Update BackUpManagerLin/Mac/Win to resolve credentials per-server from store for unattended scheduled backups.

tasks.name: Add server credential selector in UI
tasks.description: Update server connection UI to show saved servers, allow switching between them, and manage stored credentials.

tasks.name: Encrypt credentials at rest with Electron safeStorage
tasks.description: Integrate Electron safeStorage API to encrypt sensitive credential fields (passwords, SMB tokens, SSH passphrases) before writing to disk. Uses OS-native keychains: DPAPI on Windows, Keychain on macOS, libsecret/gnome-keyring on Linux. Decrypt transparently on read. Migrate existing plaintext credentials on first run. Also encrypt localStorage sensitive values (trusted-certs.json fingerprints already acceptable as non-secret, but password-adjacent data should be encrypted). Cloud credentials (rclone.conf) remain server-side root-owned — add IPC proxy via houston-broadcaster-legacy for client-initiated cloud operations rather than storing cloud creds on client.

threads.name: Custom Setup Wizard (Cockpit)
threads.description: Add a 4-step custom setup wizard in cockpit-super-simple-setup: Server Info → ZFS Setup → Samba Setup → Users & Groups.
threads.objective: Add a 4-step custom setup wizard giving advanced users manual control over pool topology, RAID levels, drive selection, share configuration, and user/group management.

tasks.name: Add setup mode selection step
tasks.description: New initial wizard step allowing user to choose Simple Setup (existing flow) or Custom Setup (new flow). Wire routing logic.

tasks.name: Build Step 1: Server Info view
tasks.description: Configure server name, admin user/pass, timezone selection, enable/disable root SSH (default disabled).

tasks.name: Build Step 2: ZFS Setup view
tasks.description: Pool config (name: tank, optional tank-backup for Active Backup), vdev type/disk selection with drag/drop grouping, pool options, dataset naming, dataset options. Show effective capacity calculations. Validate minimum drive counts per topology.

tasks.name: Build Step 3: Samba Setup view
tasks.description: Share configuration (share[0] matches dataset name for backup/restore compatibility), permissions, guest access, read-only flags. Samba credential config (same as admin user option). Multiple share support.

tasks.name: Build Step 4: Users & Groups view
tasks.description: Create new users/groups, assign users to groups, add public SSH keys per user.

tasks.name: Build custom setup summary & confirmation
tasks.description: Summary view showing all selections from all 4 steps before execution. Editable — click any section to navigate back. Match existing SummaryView pattern adapted for custom config.

tasks.name: Wire custom setup execution to managers
tasks.description: Connect custom setup configuration to houston-common-lib ZFS/Samba/Server managers. Execute pool creation, dataset creation, share creation, user/group management with user-defined parameters.

threads.name: Backup Selector & Offsite/Cloud Backup
threads.description: Build the BackupSelector UI with local/remote/cloud paths, and implement offsite and cloud backup wizard flows via cockpit-scheduler integration. Include encryption options (ZFS native encryption surfacing, rclone crypt overlay for cloud) and NAT/firewall connectivity handling.
threads.objective: Build the BackupSelector UI with local/remote/cloud paths, implement offsite and cloud backup wizard flows with encryption options and connectivity pre-checks.

tasks.name: Build BackupSelector view
tasks.description: Three-option selector: Local Backup (routes to existing BackupWizard), Remote Backup (Offsite), Remote Backup (Cloud). Route to appropriate wizard.

tasks.name: Verify & fix cockpit-scheduler SimpleUI webview
tasks.description: Re-test Dashboard webview embedding of cockpit-scheduler ?simple=1 mode. Fix auth/session issues. Ensure cloud sync and replication tasks work from client.

tasks.name: Build OffsiteBackupWizard
tasks.description: Configure backup to external ZFS server: server selection (from CredentialStore), dataset/share selection, schedule config, ZFS replication or rsync mode selection.

tasks.name: Build CloudBackupWizard
tasks.description: Configure cloud backup: rclone remote setup (S3, B2, Google Drive, etc.), source path selection, schedule configuration, retention settings. Leverage scheduler cloud sync task creation. Cloud credentials stay server-side in rclone.conf (root-owned) — client initiates operations via IPC proxy through houston-broadcaster-legacy, never stores cloud creds locally.

tasks.name: Add backup status to Dashboard
tasks.description: Show local, offsite, and cloud backup task status, health, and last-run info in Dashboard alongside existing information.

tasks.name: Add encryption options to backup wizards
tasks.description: Surface ZFS native encryption in OffsiteBackupWizard: detect encrypted datasets and use -w (raw send) flag for ZFS replication to preserve encryption. In CloudBackupWizard: offer rclone crypt overlay option for encrypting data before upload to cloud providers. Display encryption status indicators in backup task list. In Custom Setup Wizard (Thread 3), surface ZFS encryption-at-rest as a dataset option during pool/dataset creation.

tasks.name: Add NAT/firewall connectivity pre-check
tasks.description: Phase 2.5 scope: support manual port forwarding + custom SSH port entry in OffsiteBackupWizard. Add connectivity pre-check step that tests SSH reachability to target server before proceeding with backup configuration. Show clear error with troubleshooting guidance if connection fails (firewall rules, port forwarding, SSH port). Also support manual target entry for non-45Drives servers (not discovered via mDNS). Full NAT traversal (Tailscale/WireGuard tunnel integration) deferred to Phase 3.

threads.name: Restore Selector & All Restore Paths
threads.description: Build the RestoreSelector UI and implement all restore paths: local files (existing), snapshot rollback (with Active Backup support), offsite restore (files + snapshots via replication), cloud restore with cold-storage rehydration verification.
threads.objective: Build the RestoreSelector UI and implement all restore paths: local files, snapshot rollback with Active Backup support, offsite restore (files + snapshots), cloud restore with integrity verification for cold storage.

tasks.name: Build RestoreSelector view
tasks.description: Three-option selector: Local Restore (existing RestoreWizard), Restore from Snapshot (LocalRollback), Remote Restore. Remote expands to Offsite vs Cloud sub-options.

tasks.name: Build LocalRollback view (snapshot restore)
tasks.description: Select pool/dataset, browse snapshots, choose rollback target. Active Backup path: replicate from Backup pool to Storage pool, then rollback. Standard path: direct rollback from Storage pool snapshot. Confirmation with data-loss warnings.

tasks.name: Build OffsiteRestoreWizard
tasks.description: Connect to remote server (from CredentialStore). ZFS server: offer replication-based restore (snapshots). Non-ZFS or user choice: file-level restore via rsync. Browse remote backups, select files/folders, restore to local.

tasks.name: Build CloudRestoreWizard
tasks.description: Select rclone remote, browse cloud backup directories, select files/folders, download to local path via rclone copy with progress tracking.

tasks.name: Implement restore execution for all paths
tasks.description: Wire ZFS send/receive for replication restores, rsync for file restores, rclone for cloud restores. Progress tracking via rsync progress patterns from Thread 7.

tasks.name: Handle Active Backup replication logic
tasks.description: IPC and SSH flow for replicating from backup pool to storage pool before rollback when Active Backup mode is detected on the target server.

tasks.name: Add cold storage rehydration & integrity verification
tasks.description: For cloud restore from cold/archive storage tiers (S3 Glacier, B2 cold): detect storage class, show rehydration time estimate, initiate restore request, poll for availability before download. Add post-restore integrity verification step: checksum comparison (rclone check) for cloud restores, ZFS receive verification for replication restores. Surface verification result to user with clear pass/fail status before marking restore complete.

threads.name: Snapshot Management
threads.description: Snapshot viewing, manual creation, deletion (with replication anchor warnings), chain integrity checking, and status integration in the Electron client.
threads.objective: Add snapshot viewing, manual creation, deletion with chain integrity awareness, and status display in the Electron client.

tasks.name: Add IPC handlers for snapshot operations
tasks.description: Main-process IPC handlers: list snapshots, create snapshot, delete snapshot, rollback. Execute via SSH on remote server using houston-common-lib ZFS manager.

tasks.name: Build snapshot list/browse view
tasks.description: UI component showing snapshots per pool/dataset with timestamp, size, and type (manual/automated). Support filtering and sorting.

tasks.name: Build manual snapshot creation UI
tasks.description: Form for creating ad-hoc snapshots: dataset selection, custom name, optional recursive flag.

tasks.name: Build snapshot deletion with confirmation
tasks.description: Select snapshots for deletion, confirmation dialog, bulk delete support.

tasks.name: Integrate snapshot status into Dashboard
tasks.description: Show latest snapshot timestamps, snapshot counts, and automated snapshot schedule health in the main Dashboard view.

tasks.name: Snapshot chain integrity & replication anchor warnings
tasks.description: Before ZFS replication operations, verify snapshot chain integrity: check that the common snapshot (found by GUID matching) still exists on both source and target. If common snapshot is missing (chain broken), fall back to full send with user confirmation (warns about full transfer size). In snapshot deletion UI, detect and warn when a snapshot is a replication anchor (i.e., the most recent common snapshot between source and a replication target). Show warning: 'Deleting this snapshot will force a full re-replication to [target] on the next backup run.' Require explicit confirmation for anchor deletion. Tag replication anchor snapshots with a visual indicator in the snapshot list view.

threads.name: Transfer Progress, Speed & Persistence
threads.description: Port rsync optimizations from studio-share and extend progress tracking to all transfer types: rsync (real-time progress with percent/speed/ETA), ZFS send/receive (verbose output parsing), and rclone (--progress flag parsing). SSH transport hardening, transfer persistence across app restarts, concurrent transfer management.
threads.objective: Deliver real-time transfer progress for rsync, ZFS replication, and rclone cloud transfers with speed display, resume support, and transfer persistence.

tasks.name: Port rsync-path.ts optimizations
tasks.description: Bring over --partial, --inplace, --info=progress2 (with version detection), SSH transport hardening flags (IdentitiesOnly, BatchMode, keep-alive, ConnectTimeout), and bandwidth limiting from studio-share. Adapt to houston-client-manager backup manager structure.

tasks.name: Port rsync progress parser
tasks.description: Bring over progress line parsing (percent, rate, ETA, bytes transferred) from studio-share rsync-runner.ts. Wire to existing backup IPC channels. Use requestAnimationFrame coalescing for UI updates.

tasks.name: Build transfer progress UI components
tasks.description: Port useTransferProgress.ts composable pattern. Add per-transfer progress bar with speed, ETA, and percent. Add overall progress summary (X/Y completed, Z active, W queued, E failed). Support rsync, ZFS, and rclone transfer types with unified progress display.

tasks.name: Implement transfer persistence & resume
tasks.description: Port transfer-store.ts pattern: persist transfer metadata to JSON, resume on app restart via PID reattach or --partial delta resume for incomplete transfers.

tasks.name: Add concurrent transfer management
tasks.description: Implement max 3 concurrent transfer limit, queue drain mechanism, and per-transfer cancellation. Port concurrency patterns from studio-share.

tasks.name: Add ZFS send/receive progress parsing
tasks.description: Parse zfs send -v verbose output for transfer progress: snapshot name, estimated size, bytes transferred. Calculate percent complete when size is known (zfs send -nv dry-run for size estimate, then track bytes during actual send). Wire to unified transfer progress UI. Handle incremental vs full send progress differences.

tasks.name: Add rclone transfer progress parsing
tasks.description: Parse rclone --progress output: transferred bytes, speed, ETA, percent, file counts. Use rclone --stats flag for structured JSON progress when available (rclone rc --json). Wire to unified transfer progress UI. Handle rclone sync vs copy vs move operation types.

threads.name: Logging System
threads.description: Port structured logging from studio-share: winston with daily rotation, credential scrubbing, audit logging for destructive actions, log viewer UI, and renderer-to-main log bridge.
threads.objective: Port structured logging from studio-share for comprehensive application logging with credential scrubbing, audit trails for destructive actions, and a user-facing log viewer.

tasks.name: Port winston logger & scrubbing
tasks.description: Port logging init (winston + daily-rotate-file), scrubSecrets.ts (token registration, pattern-based redaction), and log policy/rate-limiting from studio-share. Configure houston-client-manager log directory and 14-day rotation.

tasks.name: Add renderer-to-main log bridge
tasks.description: Port preload appLog.info/warn/error IPC channels. Add main-side handlers with scrubbing. Wire console hijacking for uncaught exceptions.

tasks.name: Add log reading IPC handler
tasks.description: Port logs:read-client handler: parse JSON log files, return structured entries (timestamp, level, event, summary, details). Support configurable entry limit.

tasks.name: Build LogList & LogView UI
tasks.description: LogList: list log entries with level icons, timestamp, event name. Filter by level (info/warn/error), search by text. LogView: detail view for selected log entry showing full data. Wire to LOGS nav from Dashboard per app flowchart.

tasks.name: Add audit logging for destructive actions
tasks.description: Log all destructive/high-impact actions at level 'warn' with event tag 'audit': snapshot rollback, snapshot deletion (especially replication anchors), pool destroy, credential deletion, restore operations, bulk file operations. Include actor (user), target (server/dataset/snapshot), action type, and before/after state where applicable. Audit log entries should be visually distinct in LogView (e.g., amber/warning badge). Add audit log filter in LogList UI to quickly find audit trail entries.

threads.name: Electron Auto-Update
threads.description: Enable and wire electron-updater for automatic update checking, downloading, and installation. Port proven implementation from studio-share.
threads.objective: Enable and wire electron-updater for automatic update checking, downloading, and installation.

tasks.name: Port auto-update main process code
tasks.description: Copy/adapt updates.ts from studio-share. Wire IPC events (checking, available, progress, downloaded, error). Configure autoUpdater settings. Update electron-builder.json with correct repo.

tasks.name: Build update notification UI
tasks.description: Renderer-side update status: checking indicator, update available banner, download progress bar, restart to update button.

tasks.name: Configure release pipeline
tasks.description: Update electron-builder.json publish config for GitHub releases. Adapt generate-update-yml.mjs script from studio-share. Document release workflow.

threads.name: UI/UX Overhaul
threads.description: Transform the application's visual identity and interaction design across all wizard flows, the Dashboard, and shared components — making it visually distinct, intuitive, and something users genuinely want to use.
threads.objective: Transform the application's visual identity and interaction design across all wizard flows, the Dashboard, and shared components to be visually distinct, intuitive, and engaging.

tasks.name: Design distinct welcome pages for each wizard
tasks.description: Create visually unique welcome/landing pages for Setup Wizard, Backup Wizard, and Restore Wizard. Each should have its own identity (color accent, hero illustration/icon, tone of messaging) while staying cohesive within the 45Drives brand. Replace generic layouts with purpose-built compositions.

tasks.name: Redesign Dashboard layout & navigation
tasks.description: Improve Dashboard card layout: clear visual hierarchy for Setup/Backup/Restore/Logs entry points. Add status summary cards (server health, last backup, snapshot count, update status). Make primary actions prominent and secondary actions discoverable. Ensure Dashboard is the home base users want to return to.

tasks.name: Improve card & button component styling
tasks.description: Audit and refine card components (hover states, shadows, border radius, spacing). Improve button hierarchy (primary/secondary/ghost). Add subtle micro-interactions (transitions, hover effects) for polish. Consistent spacing and typography scale.

tasks.name: Improve form field layouts & wizard flow UX
tasks.description: Standardize form layouts across all wizards: consistent label placement, input sizing, help text, validation feedback. Add step indicators/progress bars to multi-step wizards. Ensure logical tab order and keyboard accessibility.

tasks.name: Add visual feedback & empty states
tasks.description: Add loading skeletons, success/error animations, empty state illustrations (e.g., No backups configured yet with call-to-action). Replace bare spinners with contextual loading states.

tasks.name: Add iconography & visual identity elements
tasks.description: Add consistent icon usage across navigation, status indicators, and action buttons. Ensure backup/restore/snapshot/cloud/server concepts each have recognizable icons. Subtle branding touches (45Drives accent colors, logo placement).

tasks.name: Responsive layout & dark mode refinement
tasks.description: Ensure all new and existing views work well at different window sizes. Refine dark mode colors/contrast for readability. Fix any dark mode inconsistencies in existing components.

threads.name: Integration Testing & QA
threads.description: End-to-end validation of all new features including UI/UX changes, security hardening, and cross-platform verification across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
threads.objective: End-to-end validation of all new features including UI/UX changes, security hardening, and cross-platform verification.

tasks.name: Test multi-server credential flows
tasks.description: Add multiple servers, switch between them, unattended backup execution with stored credentials, credential deletion.

tasks.name: Test custom setup wizard E2E
tasks.description: Full 4-step custom setup on test server: server info, pool creation with various RAID levels, share configuration, users/groups creation and assignment.

tasks.name: Test all backup paths (local/offsite/cloud)
tasks.description: BackupSelector routing, offsite backup via replication, cloud backup via rclone, verify scheduled task creation for all paths.

tasks.name: Test all restore paths (local/snapshot/offsite/cloud)
tasks.description: RestoreSelector routing, snapshot rollback (standard + Active Backup replication path), offsite restore (ZFS replication + rsync file restore), cloud restore (rclone). Include cold storage rehydration flow and post-restore integrity verification.

tasks.name: Test transfer progress, persistence & logging
tasks.description: Verify progress display for rsync (speed, ETA, percent), ZFS send/receive (verbose progress), and rclone (transfer stats). Test transfer resume after app restart, concurrent transfer limits, detached transfer recovery. Verify log viewer filtering, credential scrubbing in log entries, and audit log entries for destructive actions.

tasks.name: Test auto-update & UI/UX across flows
tasks.description: Update check/download/install cycle. Visual review of all wizard welcome pages, Dashboard redesign, dark mode consistency, responsive behavior at various window sizes.

tasks.name: Cross-platform verification (Win/Mac/Linux)
tasks.description: Test full application on all three platforms: Windows (DPAPI safeStorage, Pageant SSH agent, embedded ssh-keygen.exe), macOS (Keychain safeStorage, SSH_AUTH_SOCK, system ssh-keygen), Linux (libsecret safeStorage, SSH_AUTH_SOCK, system ssh-keygen). Verify credential encryption/decryption works on each platform. Test platform-specific process drivers (nodeDriverWindowsProcess, nodeDriverLinuxProcess). Verify mDNS discovery works across platforms.

tasks.name: Security validation testing
tasks.description: Verify credential files are encrypted at rest on disk (not readable as plaintext). Verify credential scrubbing in logs (no passwords/tokens in log files). Verify SSH key permissions (0o700 on key directories). Verify cert TOFU rejection of changed fingerprints. Verify rclone.conf never stored on client. Test snapshot chain integrity warnings appear correctly. Test replication anchor deletion warnings. Verify connectivity pre-check provides actionable errors for NAT/firewall failures.
